a.title: Caring for the mental health and wellbeing of our people

li.a: Caring for the mental health and wellbeing of our people

img.alt: Mother and daughter cuddling on a bed in a kids room
img.title: Mother and daughter cuddling on a bed in a kids room

p.span: Novartis is an innovative medicines company. Every day, we work to reimagine medicine to improve and extend people’s lives so that patients, healthcare professionals and societies are empowered in the face of serious disease. Our medicines reach 296 million people worldwide.

a.title: Novartis commitment to patients and caregivers

li.a: Novartis commitment to patients and caregivers

img.alt: Adult daughter talking to her senior parents on a bench in a park
img.title: Adult daughter talking to her senior parents on a bench in a park

div.p: Information for patients and their caregivers including clinical trial recruiting, managed access programs, funding opportunities for patient organizations and side effects reporting.

img.alt: Doctor discussing illness with patient in an office
img.title: Doctor discussing illness with patient in an office

div.p: Resources for physicians and other healthcare professionals including clinical trial recruiting, grant funding, congresses and country-level information.

a.title: Cardiovascular and metabolic disease research at Novartis

li.a: Cardiovascular and metabolic disease research at Novartis

a.title: Diseases of Aging and Regenerative medicine (DARe)

li.a: Diseases of Aging and Regenerative medicine (DARe)

a.title: DAx: exploratory disease research at Novartis

li.a: DAx: exploratory disease research at Novartis

a.title: Global Health disease area research at Novartis

li.a: Global Health disease area research at Novartis

img.alt: A female research scientist in a lab looking at a sample
img.title: A female research scientist in a lab looking at a sample

div.p: Discover how Novartis turns breakthrough science into transformative, high-value treatments.

img.alt: Family and friends having a party at home
img.title: Family and friends having a party at home

div.p: Learn about our commitments to making a positive impact on the world by providing access to innovative medicines, protecting the environment, and upholding high ethical standards. Explore the Novartis in Society Integrated Report.

img.alt: Business woman working on her laptop in a bright atmosphere
img.title: Business woman working on her laptop in a bright atmosphere

div.p: Updates and resources for investors including financial information, disclosures, events, share price, ESG and reporting.

img.alt: Overhead view of a meeting room with people in the foreground and screens in the background
img.title: Overhead view of a meeting room with people in the foreground and screens in the background

div.p: Information for journalists including press releases, statements, stories, multimedia resources and more.
Novartis is hiring! Find open positions, learn more about our strategy and culture, and apply today.

img.alt: Grandmother, mother and daughter smiling and laughing on a beach
img.title: Grandmother, mother and daughter smiling and laughing on a beach

div.p: Working together, we can reimagine medicine to improve and extend people’s lives.

div.h3: ...unfortunately your web journey hasn't met its primary endpoint.
div.p: While we work on a solution please feel free to explore the popular sections below or search for the information you need.

img.title: Couple talking in a traditional japanese Izakaya street

div.class: enable-zoom bggrey paragraph full-screen-width paragraph--type--cards paragraph--view-mode--default

div.div: At Novartis, we take pride in what we do because our work can have an extraordinary impact on people’s lives.
News and more from the frontiers of medicine.
Benefiting from our continued focus on innovation, Novartis has one of the industry's most competitive pipelines.
Treatments we currently offer via our US and International units.
